title: Amiga 1000: Ten years ahead of its time
content:
On July 23, 1985, Commodore introduced its Amiga 1000 computer. And let’s just say the world wasn’t ready for it yet. Dave Haynie, a Commodore engineer who worked on the later models, has said there was no such thing as

The post Amiga 1000: Ten years ahead of its time appeared first on The Silicon Underground.
